source_code:
def 'sum_first_n ('n) {
    'total := 0
    'i := 0
    while ('i lt 'n) do
        'total := 'total + 'i
        'i := 'i + 1
    od
    return 'total
}

paths.path_condition: (0 lt 'n) and (1 lt 'n) and (2 lt 'n) and (3 gte 'n)
